implementationSummary: Replaced hardcoded unavailable Ads KPI stubs in signals.py. CTR now emits rules_proxy advisory from analytics_weighted_product_ctr (A-34) with 1.5%/2.5% thresholds. ROAS/CAC remain unavailable: Promotion API reason when partition missing; explicit spend-sync reason when partition present but analytics_spend_denominator is null. Live ROAS/CAC formulas wired for future spend ETL (revenue/spend, spend/unique_buyers) without fabricating denominators.
assumptions: analytics_spend_denominator intentionally None per #426 — no spend fabrication
CTR thresholds (1.5% risk / 2.5% healthy) are rules_proxy stand-ins until T2 models land
Sibling docs agent owns phase-2-exit-gate-report.html field map
risks: ROAS/CAC stay unavailable until promotion spend ETL persists analytics_spend_denominator
CAC live formula uses unique_buyers_30d proxy when spend arrives — may need order-count denominator per product spec
CTR unweighted mean when product rows lack impressions (inherits #426 rollup behavior)
